content: Synth: Ah, it's getting late. I hope you're not here to cause any trouble, G9-81. G9-81: Synth, I'm here for business. The Institute needs supplies, and I'm here to make sure we get them. But since we're both here, maybe we can talk about something else for a change. Synth: Like what? In this place, there's not much to talk about other than work and survival. G9-81: True, but there's always room for a little bit of fun, isn't there? You know, the Institute has some... unconventional practices when it comes to certain things. Like, well, you know. Synth: Oh, you mean the sexual experiments they've been conducting? Yes, I'm aware of those. They're... quite disturbing. G9-81: Disturbing? Maybe.

Synth: Yes, G9-81. Very disturbing. But we have a job to do, so let's focus on that. We wouldn't want any more troublesome synths running loose, would we? G9-81: No, we wouldn't. Better to keep everyone in line, even if it means some less than pleasant experiences for them. After all, the Institute comes first. Always. Synth: Agreed. Let's get back to work then. We've got supply deliveries to handle.
